title: Filter options for Basic account

posts.author: TanyaB (Tanya B)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we have some basic filter formats for Basic accounts? I cannot use the Filter button at the top as this is a feature for Standard or above. Ideas that would really help are (which are similiar to excel)

  • Show on the column if a filter has been put on the column. Then we can see where the filter is
  • Have a “Clear all filters” button at the very top, this would make it much quicker
  • Have a filter button when you hover over each column or even as a hover box, like you do for sort. 90% of what I do requires me to filter data abnd currently it is very tedious
